diagrams.title: Responsive and accessibility evidence matrix
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Story[Story doc] --> Evidence[uiux evidence]
  Capture[Recorded verify/capture artifacts] --> Evidence
  Residual[Visual residual analysis] --> Evidence
  Evidence --> MatrixJSON[responsive-a11y-matrix.json]
  Evidence --> MatrixMD[responsive-a11y-matrix.md]
  MatrixJSON --> PR[pr prepare]
  Missing[Missing row metadata] --> NeedsEvidence[needs_evidence]
  PR --> Reviewer[Reviewer summary]

diagrams.title: Matrix proof surface and visual residual authority
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Residual[Visual residual] --> Authority[Visual QA authority]
  Matrix[Responsive/a11y matrix] --> OrganizedProof[Organized proof surface]
  OrganizedProof -. does not waive .-> Authority
  A11y[Accessibility status] --> Matrix
  Screenshots[Screenshot metadata] --> Matrix
  Head[Git HEAD binding] --> Matrix

clauses.statement: VibePro provides `uiux evidence <repo> --id <story-id>` and writes story-scoped responsive/a11y matrix JSON and Markdown artifacts from recorded verify/capture artifacts.

test_refs.anchor: UIEA-S-1 UIEA-S-4 UIEA-S-5 uiux evidence writes responsive and accessibility matrix from recorded artifacts

clauses.statement: PR preparation exposes responsive/a11y matrix status, artifact path, and missing evidence count.

test_refs.anchor: UIEA-S-2 pr prepare summarizes missing responsive and accessibility matrix rows

clauses.statement: A screenshot-only row without recorded route, viewport, state, command, and git head metadata remains `needs_evidence`.

test_refs.anchor: UIEA-S-3 uiux evidence does not accept screenshot-only rows without required metadata

clauses.statement: Accessibility status is normalized to pass, fail, needs_setup, auth_required, resource_unavailable, or missing.

test_refs.anchor: UIEA-S-1 UIEA-S-4 UIEA-S-5 uiux evidence writes responsive and accessibility matrix from recorded artifacts

clauses.statement: Visual residual authority is preserved in the matrix metadata and remains distinct from matrix readiness.

test_refs.anchor: UIEA-S-1 UIEA-S-4 UIEA-S-5 uiux evidence writes responsive and accessibility matrix from recorded artifacts
